name: short-place-plus-city-address-detected
description: Regression for the May 8 bug: at WEB_COLLECT_LOGO the user typed 'Abc karachi' (no street/road keyword, no Address: prefix — just a place name + city). The sideChannel LLM returned unclear and the bot replied 'I didn\'t catch an image' — address lost. Now the HARD RULE explicitly covers 2-5 word phrases ending in a recognizable city name (Karachi / Lahore / Mumbai / etc.) as contact_update with address.
